# Outputs

This directory contains artifacts generated by the lesson code.

## Generated Files

- `bar_chart.svg` — Bar chart of regional sales data (generated by `main.py`)
- `scatter_plot.svg` — Scatter plot showing clustered data distribution (generated by `main.py`)
- `heatmap.svg` — Heatmap of signal intensity with viridis colormap (generated by `main.py`)
- `viz_reference.md` — Reference card with chart selection guide, color palette recommendations, D3 data join pattern, and encoding hierarchy
